title: gentiana amarella var. obtusifolia
intro: Gentiana amarella var. obtusifolia, also known as closed gentian or obtusifolia gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections. Additionally, Gentiana amarella var. obtusifolia has been traditionally used as a natural remedy for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve coughs and congestion.
